SELECT arrayProduct(arr) AS product FROM test_arrays;
SELECT arr, arrayProduct(arr) AS product FROM test_arrays WHERE arrayProduct(arr) > 100;
SELECT arrayProduct([toDecimal64(1, 8), toDecimal64(2, 8), toDecimal64(3, 8)]) AS product_decimal, toTypeName(product_decimal) AS type_decimal;
SELECT arrayProduct(arr) AS product FROM (SELECT arr FROM test_arrays WHERE arr[1] > 3);
SELECT arrayProduct([num * 2 for num in (SELECT num FROM test_numbers)]) AS product_transformed;
SELECT arr, arrayProduct(arr) AS product FROM (SELECT arr FROM test_arrays LIMIT 1) UNION ALL SELECT arrayProduct(arr) FROM (SELECT arr FROM test_arrays LIMIT 2, 1);
